stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos

notableEvents.label: Tyler Locklear pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Locklear strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.detail: Eli White grounds out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin singles on a line drive to left fielder Heliot Ramos. Michael Massey scores. Starling Marte to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler lines out sharply to left fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Rincones Jr. strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson walks. Cedric Mullins scores. Victor Mesa Jr. to 3rd. Taylor Walls to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Bart pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Joey Bart walks.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit · Home Run
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto homers (9) on a fly ball to right center field. Dansby Swanson scores.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit · Fielders Choice Out
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Colt Emerson to catcher Cal Raleigh. Elly De La Cruz out at home.

notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo flies out to left fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas pops out to first baseman Bryce Harper in foul territory.

notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez lines out to right fielder Cam Smith.
